case_title: DEVITO, GINA MARIE VS GOETHALS, JOHAN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,730.87 FILED BY DEVITO, GINA MARIE AS TO DEFENDANT GOETHALS, JOHAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-10-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GOETHALS, JOHAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEVITO, GINA MARIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOETHALS, JOHAN $1,730.87 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,750.87 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CHECK OF $20.00 RETURNED TO DEF. GOETHALS WITH INSTRUCTIONS TO SUBMIT PROPER FILING FEE OF $ $71.00. (FANNY LEFT MESSAGE ON VOICEMAIL AT 9:00AM
$71 FEE FOR APPEAL NEVER RECEIVED, THEREFORE APPEAL FILING VOIDED TO ENABLE PLAINTIFF TO COLLECT JUDGMENT.
PLAINTIFF WAS NOTIFIED IN WRITING RE: VOIDING OF APPEAL;
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT GOETHALS, JOHAN
DEF.LISTS HIS ADDRESS AS 218 MCDONNEL RD.ALAMEDA (AS ON SELFADDRESSED ENVELOPE), BUT DID NOT FILE AN ADDRESS CORRECTION; SEE ORIG.F/8-10
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 25619, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEVITO, GINA MARIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOETHALS, JOHAN $1,730.87 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,850.87, MOTION RECEIVED FROM DEFENDANT FOR CONTINUANCE DENIED. JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 25619 ON 9-30-98. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GOETHALS, JOHAN
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,881.40 AS TO DEFENDANT GOETHALS, JOHAN
